source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (Full Stack, Senior)
source_jobs.description:
Even though we're not actively hiring full-force, Payflip always wants to talk to interesting talent. That's why we stay open to spontaneous applications for the Software Engineer roles.



Typically, we are looking for a Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience in this role. Ideally, you have proven experience in all parts of the fullstack spectrum: frontend, backend, infra, mobile etc.




🌟 OUR PRODUCT TEAM

We're building our Product team at Payflip for the long run, and are looking for experienced engineers who want to play a role in growing our salary platform, bringing additional expertise on board to grow to an even more excellent product.



Our current Product team consists of multiple squads that autonomously own the full lifecycle of the product, pushing it from discovery to production. You'll work together with other experienced engineers, PMs, and the CTO to deliver on an exciting product roadmap.



The tech stack at Payflip to achieve this consists of multiple modern technologies https://www.notion.so/payflip/Payflip-s-Tech-Stack-1debf70bee8680349354e099802af72e?pvs=4. Where core components in our stack are:

 - React

 - Node.js (NestJS)

 - GraphQL

 - MongoDB



We value bringing eagerness & skill in building mature & maintainable solutions with a great DX more than an exact overlap with our tech stack. Experience in all of them is not a must, but willingness & autonomy to learn definitely is.




🧑‍💻 ABOUT YOU

You would be a good fit with our team if most of this sounds like you:

 - Proficiency with most of our core technologies

 - Strong mastery & knowledge in a certain domain (e.g backend, frontend, infra) that you want to inspire others with, teach best practices, help scale.

 - Managing technical debt pragmatically with an ability to strategically balance resilience, testing, and documentation with making quick trade-offs in order to ship products that prioritise impact or implementation.

 - You're a product builder, meaning you think outside of the coding and tech. You approach opportunities & problems in the squad and determine what success looks like, driving it home, collaborating with others in the product team often (designers, PMs, CTO)

 - Eager to help in constructing our engineering culture & practices. Align with people across squads, leveraging the right documentation and software patterns.

 - Fluent in English.



Above all we value a high internal drive, curiosity and strong potential: convincing us of this in the hiring process is guaranteed to make you a Payflip'er!




👋 ABOUT US

Payflip's mission is to become the new salary partner, truly making salaries work.

By empowering both employees and HR teams, we:

 - Create transparency and trust around compensation

 - Drive financial literacy and wellbeing

 - Make Belgium’s workforce more resilient, engaged, and prosperous



So that in the future, employees get the best out of their salaries, HR teams shift focus from admin to people, and salaries are seen as a tool for growth (not frustration).



We are a fresh, fast-growing startup with a happy bunch of software engineers, product specialists, business developers & reward specialists.

Becoming part of the Payflip team means that you join a close-knit team where you will take up solid responsibilities. Let’s say that a Payflip’er smells the opportunity of ownership from miles away!




💜 PAYFLIP'S CULTURE

Our company culture revolves around 3 pillars:

 - Transparency

 - Eagerness to learn

 - Ownership

We are 100% transparent with everything that happens in the company. We tell each other everything. There is not even one Google Drive file in our archive that is not accessible for all.

We invest in self-improvement. That is why you have at least 1 day per month that is dedicated to learning. Together with the other members of the reward hub, you try to investigate an interesting market trend or to fix a company inefficiency you choose yourself, with the methodology of

source_jobs.title: Account Executive (NL)
source_jobs.description:
Payflip is growing amaaaazingly fast, and is looking for sales heroes! Do you also believe that wages are not just a matter of some numbers? Always wanted to boost the purchasing power of 11 million Belgians? An undeniable talent for closing deals? Then we want you!



🌟 ABOUT US


Payflip is going for a revolutionary yet logical salary solution for employees. Flexible compensation as the successful next step in every salary policy. Sounds good, right?

Imagine every employee having control over their own salary. This not only leads to better financial wellbeing, but also to a stronger bond with the company. That's what we believe at Payflip. Salary can be more than just some numbers, right? 😉

We're a young, fast-growing start-up. A quirky bunch of software developers, product designers, account executives & customer success managers.

Joining the Payflip community means becoming part of a tight-knit team where you can take on clear responsibilities and grow with the organization. Let's put it this way: a Payflip'er smells the opportunity of ownership from miles away!



🌟 ABOUT YOUR POSITION


As Account Executive, you are the face of Payflip towards Belgian companies. Your mission? Show employers how to make salaries truly work for their people. You manage the full sales cycle - from first conversation to signature - working with our sales playbook that you help refine yourself. You represent Payflip at HR events throughout Belgium and tell our story to companies ready to take their salary policy to the next level. Together with the sales team, you build the growth of our Belgian customer base in your segment.

Because at Payflip, we believe employees should have control over their own salary. And that's what you help companies with. 🫶



🌟 ABOUT YOU


We're looking for entrepreneurial account executives to co-write our growth story

Are you a 'bar raiser', and does the following describe you:

 - Passionate about sales, but not too "love stoned" to question and optimize current sales practices

 - +2 years of relevant commercial experience

 - Driven to represent Payflip as an ambassador in Belgium.

 - Initiator, pragmatic, and a fearless go-getter. We have it in for people who learn from their mistakes and keep sharpening themselves!

 - Fluent in Dutch and English. French is a plus!
   


🌟 WHAT DO WE OFFER YOU?


We feel it is only natural to remain true to our mission at all times. That's why we offer you the most optimized salary package in the entire Belgian SME market.



🌟 YOU WILL RECEIVE FROM US


 - a transparent salary based on your impact (check our salary grid here https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1O0BBJ6gSVDfj7-wtrpgUSUwtsq_8nIMd-FF_M1on86M/edit?usp=sharing)

 - stock options

 - the best possible flexible compensation plan

 - the Alan healthcare package

 - meal vouchers and eco vouchers

 - a mobility budget or company car

 - the possibility to work remotely as much as you want (we even give you a budget for this!). Our office is located opposite Brussels Central Station, but we offer you coworking options in cities like Antwerp (Silversquare) or Ghent (Wintercircus).

 - Workation? You get a generous remote working budget from us for coworking spaces in Belgium and abroad!

 - An L&D budget so you can further develop yourself

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
Payflip is growing amaaaazingly fast, and is looking for an eager Customer Success Manager!

Do you also believe that wages are not just a matter of some numbers? Always wanted to boost the purchasing power of 11 million Belgians? An undeniable talent for closing deals? Then we want you!



🌟 ABOUT US

Payflip's mission is to thoroughly shake up the Belgian compensation landscape. Do you have health insurance, group insurance, a company car, a bike lease, meal vouchers, and a flex plan spread across six different tools? And an incomprehensible monthly payslip in yet another one?

Gone are these days. Enter: Payflip's salary super app.

One platform, all salary stuff. That way, every employee truly has their salary in their own hands, and an employer wastes less time on fragmented admin. The result? More focus on the team's financial literacy. Without administrative headaches for the HR team.

We're a young, fast-growing start-up. A quirky bunch of software developers, product designers, account executives, support specialists & customer success managers. Joining the Payflip community means becoming part of a tight-knit team where you can take on clear responsibilities and grow with the organization. Let's put it this way: a Payflip'er smells the opportunity of ownership from miles away!



🌟 YOUR POSITION

We're looking for a Customer Success Manager who will play a defining role for our customers, from implementation to adoption and expansion. For HR managers, you're a true salary partner who takes their compensation strategy to the next level. You also don't just manage a portfolio 'from head to toe', you help lay the foundation of a scalable customer success team by focusing on playbooks (churn, adoption, expansion), health scoring, and a strong communication strategy. You also help build Payflip's next chapter: besides flex reward functionalities, we're soon launching extra salary modules (including Payflip Food), and you help our customers grow into them. But there's more to it than just designing a strategy. That's why we're looking for someone who isn't afraid to roll up their sleeves either. Is that you? Join our tribe!



🧑‍💻 ABOUT YOU

 - Passionate about CS, but not too 'love stoned' to question and optimize current processes.

 - +2 years of experience in a relevant, commercial role within a similar environment

 - You have experience with consultative selling: you recognize an opportunity within an account and dare to actually seize it.

 - You feel comfortable when a playbook doesn't exist yet, because you'd rather help write it yourself.

 - You look forward to being the main point of contact for customers and making sure they become the Payflip ambassadors of your dreams.

 - You're a true initiator, pragmatic, and a fearless go-getter. We have it in for people who learn from their mistakes and keep themselves sharp!

 - Fluent in Dutch, French and English.

Can't tick every box? No worries, we know superheroes don't exist. People with talent and passion, fortunately, do!



🌟 WHAT DO WE OFFER YOU?

We feel it is only natural to remain true to our mission at all times. That's why we offer you the most optimized salary package in the entire Belgian SME market.

 - a transparent salary based on your impact (check our salary grid here https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1O0BBJ6gSVDfj7-wtrpgUSUwtsq_8nIMd-FF_M1on86M/edit?usp=sharing)

 - stock options

 - the best possible flexible compensation plan

 - the Alan healthcare package

 - meal vouchers (through Payflip of course) and eco vouchers

 - a mobility budget or company car

 - the possibility to work remotely (we even give you a budget for this!). Our office is located opposite Brussels Central Station, but we offer you coworking options in cities like Antwerp (Silversquare) or Ghent (Wintercircus).

 - Workation? You get a generous remote working budget from us for coworking spaces in Belgium and abroad!

 - An L&D budget so you can further develop yoursel

notes: Mostly sales and customer success roles, with a single software engineer posting.
